logs.msg: Finding 2: P1 — execute() doesn't accept framework abort signal. Pi's ToolDefinition.execute signature is execute(toolCallId, params, signal, onUpdate, ctx) but the workflow tool only accepts (id, params). The signal parameter is silently dropped, so blocking workflows (background: false) cannot be cancelled by the framework. executeWorkflow already supports signal in its options but never receives it. Fix: wire signal through from execute() to executeWorkflow().
